sprints.sprint_title: Week 1 — Backend Foundation (NestJS Modular Architecture + /health + Swagger)
sprints.goal: Ship a production-ready NestJS backend skeleton with modular architecture, env config, global validation, consistent errors, and a working /health endpoint so integration can start immediately.
acceptance_criteria: npm install + npm run start:dev runs without errors
GET /health responds 200 with JSON {status:'ok', service, timestamp}
No secrets hardcoded; env-based config used

sprints.sprint_title: Week 2 — Frontend Foundation (Vite + Router + React Query + API client)
sprints.goal: Create a stable frontend base with routing, React Query API layer, env config, and a clean structure so feature development starts fast and safely.

will_be_delivered: React Router DOM with layout + routes (/ /login /dashboard 404)

acceptance_criteria: npm run dev works without errors

sprints.sprint_title: Week 3 — Docker + PostgreSQL + Prisma (ERD → schema + migrations + seed)
sprints.goal: Dockerize the API, run Postgres in docker-compose, and convert ERD to Prisma schema with migrations and seed so real features can land fast.
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up runs API + DB

sprints.goal: Implement authentication and role-based access control for key roles (SUPER_ADMIN, UNIVERSITY_ADMIN, TEACHER, STUDENT, EMPLOYER) to unlock secured feature development.

sprints.sprint_title: Week 5 — University + Users (University, Admin, Teacher, Student) core flows
sprints.goal: Ship core university/user management modules to support verification workflows and portfolio ownership.
acceptance_criteria: University admins can manage teachers/students in their university
Validation and pagination supported on list endpoints

sprints.sprint_title: Week 6 — Projects + Verification Requests + Badge levels
sprints.goal: Deliver project CRUD + verification request workflow with badge levels and strict university rules.
acceptance_criteria: Only university projects can be verified
Reviewers must belong to same university
Project status updates correctly after approval/rejection

sprints.sprint_title: Week 7 — Portfolio MVP + Skills + Discovery Search
sprints.goal: Ship a public portfolio MVP plus skills CRUD and basic discovery search so the platform has shareable value.

will_be_delivered: Portfolio frontend route /portfolio/:username with Template v1

acceptance_criteria: Public portfolio renders for a username
Search returns students filtered by skill/university/verified

sprints.sprint_title: Week 8 — GitHub Integration + Stripe Payments (minimal monetization)
sprints.goal: Add GitHub OAuth repo import and Stripe payments for university subscription + student premium so the product can monetize.

will_be_delivered: List repos + import repo as project
Stripe Checkout for university plan + student premium

acceptance_criteria: User can connect GitHub and import repo
Stripe checkout success updates plan status

sprints.sprint_title: Week 9 — Launch Hardening (security, tests, perf, observability, docs)
sprints.goal: Stabilize and harden for launch: security baseline, CI, logging, tests, and release docs.

sprints.sprint_title: Week 10 — Bugfix + UX polish + Launch Candidate
sprints.goal: Fix launch-blocking bugs, polish UX, and ship launch candidate with stable docs and onboarding.

will_be_delivered: Bugfix pass across backend and frontend
